project_type: Static HTML page - premium calculator for MiUHC insurance product
language: HTML/JavaScript (single file app with embedded data)
build_system: None - single static HTML file served from GitHub Pages
test_framework: None - manual verification by checking displayed values
test_command: python3 script to verify data extraction matches expected values
verification_instructions: 1. Extract data from Excel, 2. Verify Syariah Pria age 45 Topaz ID = 15,576,400 and Topaz = 18,594,700 display correctly as Premi Tahunan (no *1.12), 3. Verify RJ and Gigi options appear
setup_instructions: No setup needed. Python3 with zipfile and xml.etree.ElementTree (both built-in) are available for Excel parsing. openpyxl/pandas are NOT available (network restricted).
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install pip packages. Must use Python built-in zipfile + xml.etree.ElementTree to parse xlsx files. No openpyxl, no pandas.
contribution_requirements: Single HTML file with all CSS/JS/data embedded inline
key_patterns: Data is stored as JavaScript objects DATA_KONV and DATA_SYARIAH with structure {PRIA: {age: [values...]}, WANITA: {age: [values...]}}. Each age array has plan values: [Diamond, Ruby, Emerald, Topaz, Topaz ID, Jade, Jade ID, Sapphire, Diamond Smart, Ruby Smart, Emerald Smart, Topaz Smart, ...]. Konvensional has 15 values (8 normal + 7 smart including Topaz ID Smart and Jade ID Smart). Syariah has 13 values (8 normal + 5 smart, no Topaz ID Smart or Jade ID Smart). calcPremi() function computes display values. buildCard() renders plan cards. calculate() is the main render function.
directory_structure: Flat structure - all files in root. Index.html is the app. Excel files are data sources. PDF files are downloadable brochures.
